name: openai-image
description: Generate OpenAI-compatible images with canvas integration. Supports prompt styles, batch jobs, canvas-based annotation workflows, and iterative image editing.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and iterate on AI images with infinite canvas support.
interface.longDescription: OpenAI Image adds a reusable image-generation workflow for Codex, Claude Code, and IDE MCP clients. Now includes canvas-hand integration for infinite canvas workflows: generate images, place them on canvas, annotate with arrows, and iterate based on annotations. Fully TypeScript-based unified MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Generate a polished product mockup image from this prompt.
Open my canvas and place an image on it.
Read my canvas annotations and redraw the image.
